title: Sarah J Maas Writes Two New Fantasy Books
summary: Sarah J Maas is a famous author who writes fantasy and romance books. She has sold over 75 million books around the world. She just announced two new books in her A Court of Thorns and Roses series. The books will come out in October this year and in January 2027. She talked about this on a podcast called Call Her Daddy. Sarah said the story is very big and has four parts across three books. She wants readers to see it as one big story, not separate books. She hasn't released a book since 2021, so this is exciting for fans. Her books are popular on TikTok, where people talk about them. She also writes other series like Throne of Glass and Crescent City.

a set of books that tell one big story
a show you listen to on the internet

background_read: Sarah J Maas is a best-selling author known for mixing fantasy and romance in her books. She started writing in 2015 and became very popular during the pandemic. Her stories often have magic, adventure, and love, and fans enjoy discussing them online, especially on TikTok in a community called #BookTok. She has written other series like Throne of Glass and Crescent City, which have many books. This announcement is special because she hasn't released a new book since 2021, so readers are excited to get more stories from her.
Article_Structure: WHO: Sarah J Maas, a best-selling author
WHAT: She announced two new books in her A Court of Thorns and Roses series
WHERE: On the Call Her Daddy podcast
WHY: To share a big new story with fans after a long break

perspectives.description: Fans are happy to get new books after a long wait
